trending_videos.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day - Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
A Brand New Day starts now.
Watch the official trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, exclusively in theatres July 31. Play Marvel’s Spider-Man 2, available now in the PlayStation Plus Game Catalog.

trending_videos.title: First Four: Miami (Ohio) vs. SMU
trending_videos.description: The No. 11 Miami RedHawks and the No. 11 SMU Mustangs face off in the First Four round of the 2026 NCAA Tournament at UD Arena. The winner will advance as the No. 11 seed in the Midwest Region to face the sixth-seeded Tennessee Volunteers.

trending_videos.title: SPIDERMAN BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER BREAKDOWN! Every Easter Egg & Detail You Missed!
trending_videos.description:
Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer FRAME BY FRAME Breakdown & Analysis by New Rockstars’ Erik Voss! Get 10% off your first month of therapy at https://betterhelp.com/NewRockstars. #sponsored

Here is EVERYTHING you missed in the trailer for Spider-Man Brand New Day (2026) - every clue for the MUTANTS, Jean Grey, even ROGUE?? What was removed from this trailer? Will Daredevil appear in this movie? Will Norman Osborn? Will Bruce Banner’s “savage” Hulk form? How will this movie set up Avengers Doomsday and Secret Wars? Erik Voss breaks down this trailer frame by frame for every callback to Andrew Garfield Spider-Man and Tobey Maguire Spider-Man and why these callbacks are so important to what’s really happening to Tom Holland Peter Parker in this movie!

We're back at the UCB Theater in Los Angeles on April 17th, come in person or stream anywhere. Tickets: https://ucbcomedy.com/show/new-rockstars-live-its-morbin-time

NEW ROCKSTARS NETWORK
youtube.com/@WitchingHourNR
youtube.com/@BreakroomN

spider-man brand new day trailer reaction

trending_videos.title: America Reports
trending_videos.description: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

trending_videos.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Teaser Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters December 18 #DuneMovie #FilmedforIMAX

Directed by Denis Villeneuve and written by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, Dune: Part Three is based on the novel Dune Messiah by Frank Herbert and delivers the epic conclusion to Villeneuve’s trilogy. The film stars Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach De Bankolé, with Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Javier Bardem, and features newcomers Nakoa-Wolf Momoa and Ida Brooke.

trending_videos.title: Los Angeles Lakers at Houston Rockets
trending_videos.description: The Los Angeles Lakers travel to face the Houston Rockets for a high-stakes Western Conference clash at the Toyota Center. The Rockets lead the season series 1-0 when they 119-96 in Los Angeles. Luka Dončić leads the Lakers with nearly 33 PPG.

Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group.

trending_videos.title: Cryo Archive Launch Trailer | Marathon
trending_videos.description:
//: ALL NODES RESOLVED 
//: UESC MARATHON ACCESS: INITIATED 
|| countdown engaged 
|| the marathon is waking 

The final ARG puzzle has been resolved in a massive community effort orchestrated by #breach-protocol in the official Marathon Discord. 

But this isn’t the end. Aboard the Marathon, you’ll face labyrinthian corridors, raid-like puzzles, and seven frozen Vaults leading to an entity even the UESC fears. 
 
The Marathon is waking. Prepare. Coming March 20, 2026. 

Purchase Marathon now:
Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3065800/Marathon/
PlayStation 5: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marathon/
Xbox Series X|S: https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9p8mgmxndv9b

Follow Marathon:
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@marathonthegame
Instagram: https://instagram.com/marathonthegame
Twitter: https://x.com/marathonthegame
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/marathonthegame.bungie.net
Discord: https://discord.gg/marathonthegame

entertainment_dominance.description: The majority of the trending content is entertainment-focused, including trailers and breakdowns of popular franchises such as Spider-Man, Dune, and Sonic the Hedgehog.
insights: Continued strong interest in franchise-based content.
Potential for creating supplementary content such as breakdowns and Easter egg videos, which capitalize on existing fan bases.

sports_and_news.description: There is also a notable presence of sports and news content, indicating a balanced interest in current events and live-action sports.
insights: Opportunities exist for channels focusing on live sports commentary and news analysis.
Brands can consider collaborations with sports and news channels to reach a broader audience.

music_content.description: Music content is present but less dominant, indicating niche but dedicated fanbases.
insights: Potential for growth in music-related content, particularly lyrical videos and collaborations with popular artists.

popular_channels.description: Channels like PlayStation, truTV, and Warner Bros. are featured, indicating a trend towards authoritative and well-known brands.
insights: Brands with established followings have a greater chance of reaching trending status.
Emerging creators may benefit from partnerships with larger brands to gain visibility.

content_specialization.description: Each top channel specializes in its respective genre, suggesting that targeted content strategies are effective.
insights: Channels should focus on niche content to build a loyal audience.
Content creators can explore specific themes or series to carve out a niche market.

franchise-based_content.description: High interest in franchise-related content creates opportunities for long-term content planning around movie releases and game launches.
insights: Develop a calendar of upcoming franchise releases and plan content around these milestones.
Consider creating episodic content or series that delve into fan theories and franchise lore.

cross-category collaborations.description: The intersection of different content categories like entertainment and news can create unique opportunities for innovative content.
insights: Explore content that blends entertainment and current events, such as commentary on how popular media reflects societal trends.
Partner with creators from adjacent categories to tap into new audiences.

localized content.description: Localized content, such as music videos in different languages, can cater to specific regional audiences.
insights: Identify key demographics and create content tailored to regional tastes and languages.
Leverage localization to expand reach in international markets.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
